name: continent-codes
title: List of continent codes
description: Two-letter codes and English names for the seven continents (Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, South America). Data was compiled manually from multiple reference sources.

licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License v1.0

sources.name: IAU WGPSN Abbreviations
sources.title: International Astronomical Union Working Group for Planetary System Nomenclature — Abbreviations

sources.name: Wikipedia data file
sources.title: Wikipedia — List of sovereign states and dependent territories by continent (data file)

resources.name: continent-codes
resources.description: Two-letter codes and English names for the seven continents. Each row represents one continent. Codes are short, unique, permanent identifiers used across geographic reference systems.

fields.name: Code
fields.description: Two-letter continent code (e.g. AF for Africa, EU for Europe).

fields.name: Name
fields.description: English name of the continent (e.g. Africa, Europe).
